subcodes.first_line: O handmaiden of the Most Great Land! A few lines were penned previously, and now, once again, this letter is written [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای خادمه ارض اعظم از پیش سطری چند مرقوم گردید و حال نیز مجددا این ورقه تحریر
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @permission for visit; pilgrimage
